ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state's population */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county's population */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "county_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the county's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the election took place */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "dem_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "rep_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Republican party */,
  "other_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for other parties or candidates */,
  "dem_share" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the region's population */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the demographic data is collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of race in the population */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income in the population */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of education in the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender in the population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicity in the population */,
  "voter_registration_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population registered to vote */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
